title: lomatia milnei
intro: Lomatia milnei, also known as Kelpie or New Zealand Broom, is a flowering plant native to New Zealand and Australia. It has been used traditionally for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Lomatia milnei include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and its extracts are used in various forms, including capsules and topical creams.
